operating_state: Total revenues increased to $2.3 billion driven by Liberty Transaction acquisition of 519 properties adding 100 million square feet. Same store NOI grew 6.1% with occupancy reaching 97.1% consolidated, supported by development completions and rental rate growth from positive rent change on rollover. Net earnings attributable to common stockholders reached $964 million for the six months ended June 30, 2021, compared to $894 million in the prior year period.
cost_structure: Real Estate Operations NOI expanded with rental expenses increasing proportionally to revenue growth from expanded portfolio. Strategic Capital NOI declined primarily due to absence of promote revenue which totaled only $12 million versus $228 million in prior year. General and administrative expenses rose driven by higher compensation costs linked to outperformance and share price appreciation, while real estate depreciation increased reflecting portfolio expansion.
material_events: Completed $2.6 billion senior note issuances across euro, dollar and yen currencies at 0.9% weighted average rate with 13.9 year average term. Redeemed higher-rate debt, extending consolidated maturity to 11 years and reducing effective rate to 1.6%. Generated $2.0 billion net proceeds from property contributions to co-investment ventures and third-party dispositions. Established second global credit facility while increasing quarterly dividends to $0.63 per common share.
macro_exposures: COVID-19 pandemic uncertainty continues across global markets despite strong logistics real estate fundamentals. Foreign currency exposure managed through co-investment venture structures and functional currency borrowings with natural hedging supplemented by derivative instruments. E-commerce acceleration and supply chain resilience trends driving structural demand increases for logistics real estate.
forward_outlook: Development activities expected to accelerate with strong rent growth and asset valuations anticipated to drive operating results through mark-to-market opportunity on in-place leases. Available liquidity provides significant capacity for value-added investment opportunities, with investment in unconsolidated entities supporting strategic capital deployment through co-investment ventures.
uncertainty_profile: Development portfolio completion timeline extends through September 2022 with leasing velocity dependent on market conditions. Equity commitments to co-investment ventures require fulfillment through property contributions or cash with various expiration dates through 2028. Foreign currency translation impacts on international investments despite hedging strategies, with regulatory compliance requirements for REIT status maintenance.
